ai_insights.title: 10.5% of tickets are preventable
ai_insights.description: 317 tickets could be prevented through better UX. Top preventable categories: Utilities (57), Electrical (55), Appliance (48).
ai_insights.recommendation: Invest in self-serve tools, proactive information sharing, and guided troubleshooting flows

ai_insights.title: 181 tickets (6.0%) required no physical intervention
ai_insights.description: Breakdown: 137 resolved by sharing info, 4 self-resolved, 11 no real issue, 29 duplicates. These tickets exist because users lacked access to information or tools.
ai_insights.recommendation: Build a self-serve portal with payment visibility, ticket status tracking, and troubleshooting guides

ai_insights.title: 29.3% of tickets come within the first week of tenancy
ai_insights.description: 882 tickets are raised within 7 days of a customer's first ticket. Top themes: Water & Plumbing (144), Appliances (142), Fixtures & Carpentry (137). This is pure onboarding friction.
ai_insights.recommendation: Create an interactive move-in checklist that proactively addresses WiFi setup, utility connections, appliance guides, and key contacts

ai_insights.title: 24 tickets involve communication gaps
ai_insights.description: 0.8% of tickets mention lack of response, delayed updates, or follow-up confusion. Every follow-up ticket is a UX failure.
ai_insights.recommendation: Implement automated status updates via WhatsApp/SMS when ticket status changes, vendor is assigned, or resolution is complete

ai_insights.title: 5 properties account for disproportionate ticket volume
ai_insights.description: Worst health scores: R1 (score 0.9/10, 429 tickets), R2 (score 1.0/10, 405 tickets), R0 (score 1.6/10, 105 tickets). These need proactive maintenance audits.
ai_insights.recommendation: Schedule quarterly maintenance inspections for properties with health score below 5

ai_insights.title: ₹2,075,204 total cost across all tickets
ai_insights.description: Highest cost categories: Plumbing (₹455,234), Appliance (₹400,509), Carpentry (₹385,644). Preventable tickets alone account for ₹104,559.
ai_insights.recommendation: Focus cost reduction on the top 3 categories — preventable tickets represent recoverable spend

ai_insights.title: Average resolution: 7.7 days (median: 3.9 days)
ai_insights.description: Slowest categories: Maintenance (18.6d avg), Move-in (17.6d avg), Documentation (13.3d avg). Tickets open over 7 days have 2x frustration scores.
ai_insights.recommendation: Set category-specific SLAs and display expected resolution times to tenants at ticket creation

ai_insights.title: 199 tickets could have been self-served
ai_insights.description: Top self-serve themes: Connectivity (46), Appliances (34), Payments & Billing (26). These were resolved by resets, basic troubleshooting, or information that should be accessible.
ai_insights.recommendation: Add contextual self-help before ticket creation: 'Before raising a ticket, try these steps...'

ai_insights.title: 83 customers have raised 10+ tickets each
ai_insights.description: Top: Debjit (47), Harsh (43), Ayush (42), Nikhil (38), Tushar (37). These may be power users, unhappy tenants, or properties with systemic issues.
ai_insights.recommendation: Proactively reach out to high-ticket customers to understand root causes and improve their experience
